note: Provider submodule of fontyourface; import needs network (no key), so cases are recipe (response-graded).

evals.prompt: Does the Adobe Edge Fonts submodule for @font-your-face need an API key or account, and how are fonts imported?
evals.expected_output: No account or API key is needed. Fonts are imported by clicking Import on the @font-your-face settings form (auto-import at install is disabled because the catalog is large).

evals.prompt: What is the fontyourface provider id and provider name for Adobe Edge fonts?
